hooks.command: cd C:/Users/brian/AIResearch/examples/fishing-copilot && uv run python -m pytest --tb=short -q 2>/dev/null || true
cd C:/Users/brian/AIResearch/examples/fishing-copilot && uv run ruff check --fix . 2>/dev/null && uv run ruff format . 2>/dev/null || true
grep -rn 'AKIA\|sk-\|ghp_\|password\s*=\|TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN\s*=' "$TOOL_INPUT_PATH" 2>/dev/null && echo 'BLOCKED: Potential secret detected in file' && exit 2 || exit 0

echo '## CRITICAL CONTEXT — PRESERVE ACROSS COMPACTION
- Project: Fishing Copilot | Stack: Python 3.12, Claude Haiku Batch, SQLite, Twilio, GitHub Actions
- Test: uv run python -m pytest --tb=short -q
- Lint: uv run ruff check --fix . && uv run ruff format .
- Key: Two-pass LLM (extract→synthesize), LLM-as-resilience-layer, process-once-deliver-many
- Pipeline: scrape→collect→extract→synthesize→deliver (cron 4AM MT)
- Current task: check docs/TASKS.md for active work'
